patches.hypothesis: Use a more robust deserialization method and handle general cases instead of specific test inputs and add more test cases to cover edge cases.
patches.fixed_method: protected JsonNode _bindAsTree(JsonParser jp) throws IOException { ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper(); JsonNode result = mapper.readValue(jp, JsonNode.class); if (result == null) { throw new IOException("Invalid JSON data:" + jp.getText()); } return result; }
patches.original_hypothesis: The _bindAsTree method was not properly deserializing the JsonNode data. The _bindAsTree method needs to be improved to properly deserialize the JsonNode data.
